title: Error Handling Config
description: Error handling configuration for a node or workflow. Determines what happens when an error occurs in a process.

oneOf.description: Retry strategy: Retry the operation on error with optional delay and retry limits.

max_retry_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts before giving up.

retry_delay.description: Delay in seconds between each retry attempt.

oneOf.description: Pause strategy: Pause the workflow for a number of seconds before continuing.

strategy.description: Pause execution for a set time before continuing.

pause_seconds.description: Number of seconds to pause before continuing execution.

oneOf.description: Continue strategy: Skip the error and continue execution immediately.

strategy.description: Ignore the error and continue execution.

oneOf.description: Exit strategy: Stop execution completely on error.

strategy.description: Stop execution entirely when an error occurs.
